headline: Mondelēz International Declares Regular  Quarterly Dividend of $0.50 per share
summary: CHICAGO, May 20, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The Board of Directors of Mondelēz International, Inc. (Nasdaq: MDLZ) today declared a regular quarterly dividend of $0.50 per share of Class A common stock. This dividend is payable on July 14, 2026, to shareholders of record as of the close of business on June 30, 2026. About Mondelēz International Mondelēz International, Inc. headline: Uncountable Hosts Unify Summit to Advance AI-Powered Innovation
summary: PHILADELPHIA, May 20, 2026--Over 100 attended from the chemicals, advanced materials, food & beverage, electronics, cosmetics & personal care, agriculture, and CPG industries.

headline: DutyFreeDeal.com Announces Its Integration Within Duty Free Zone Group, Strengthening Global Duty-Free Food Distribution Through DutyFreeFood.com
summary: DutyFreeFood.com, a subsidiary of Duty Free Zone Group, serves as an official distributor of leading international food and beverage products, including globally recognized brands such as Mondelez, Coca-Cola, Corona, and others. headline: Mondelez Targets Gamers And Automation As Valuation Gap Draws Attention
summary: Mondelez International, ticker NasdaqGS:MDLZ, has launched SOUR PATCH KIDS CHEWS designed for the gaming community. The company is also planning to accelerate automation and AI integration across its U.S. manufacturing and distribution centers. These moves combine a targeted product rollout with a shift in how Mondelez runs its production footprint. For investors watching NasdaqGS:MDLZ, these updates arrive with the stock trading at $61.29. Recent performance is mixed, with the share price...
